title: Cantonese Eva OP
wikitext:
[]: Cantonese Eva OP             Quote Post by fukuda » Thu Feb 22, 2018 6:19 pm I'd just like to share the Lyrics to the Cantonese Eva OP right here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DePZFPCWxmo From Commenter: 1qszsqaw221 "讓聖經裡的迷途天使又傳道 在這伊甸園你我又再碰到 使徒們，到世間浮沉 歷史的真相有太多的神 無論要你落淚 或要她的鮮血 都不可見到神靈步近 阿門，我快將沉淪 被貶的天使向世間走近 尋覓到我慾望 或有一點悲憤傷 心怨恨從未發問 再抱憾再厭倦一生也未如願 我也是經過路人 你背後有對翼光圈裡 又會否用真心拯救我心 舊約中有位迷途天使在傳道 暴走激鬥墮落時候會變化 幻想全部頹然倒塌未留下 但我想知道世界是有錯嗎 用愛心與她靈魂交錯地存在 倦透的都市有你便有火花愛人，有太多傳聞 歷史中毀去了幾多戀人 然後我會落淚與她驚天激吻 都彷彿見到情如地陷 阿門，我已經沉淪 被貶的天使向世間追問 懷著救世慾望 帶走相親相 襯新的教義全部放任 再抱憾再厭倦一生也未如願 我也是經過路人 你背後有對翼光圈裡 又會否用真心拯救我心 在聖經裡的迷途天使又傳道 但世間欺詐墮落全沒有變化 諾亞拯救的人群早已沒留下 讓這伊甸園戰鬥後變細沙 用愛心妄想靈魂天使會存 在倦透的都市有你便有火花 冷眼望再跌宕天邊也漸留下 最美麗一片落霞 對抗著憤懣著心中有夢我卻摘不走伊甸野花 舊約中有位迷途天使在傳道 暴走激鬥墮落時候會變化 幻想全部頹然倒塌未留下 但我想知道世界是有錯嗎 用愛心與她靈魂交錯地存在 倦透的都市有你便有火花" "Let the lost angels in the Bible preach again In the garden of Eden, you and I meet again The apostles, drifting into the world There are too many gods in the truth of history Whether you want to cry or not Or with her blood? You can't see the divine step Amen, I'll drown soon The Fallen Angel approached the world Searching for my lust Or a little grief and hurt Heart grudges never ask questions Then again tired of life also do not regret I'm passing by, too You have a pair of wings behind you Will you save my heart with your heart? In the Old Testament there was a lost angel preaching Runaway battle will change when fall I did not leave all the collapse of fantasy But I wonder if there is anything wrong with the world? In love with her soul staggered existence You have sparks in your tired city Lovers, there are too many rumors How many lovers in the history of destroyed Then I'll cry and surprise her with a kiss Seems to see the situation such as subsidence Amen, I've fallen The banished angel asked the world With the desire to save the world Take away a blind date The new doctrine is wholly laissez faire Then again tired of life also do not regret I'm passing by, too You have a pair of wings behind you Will you save my heart with your heart? The lost angels in the Bible preach again But there is no change in the world of deceit and depravity Noah saved the crowds long ago Let the garden of Eden be a fine sand after battle Delusions of love, souls, angels will survive In the tired City, you have sparks A look ups and also gradually left the horizon again One of the most beautiful sunset glow Have a dream with resentment against me but not pick flowers go Eden In the Old Testament there was a lost angel preaching Runaway battle will change when fall I did not leave all the collapse of fantasy But I wonder if there is anything wrong with the world? In love with her soul staggered existence You have sparks in your tired city" Thoughts?

[]: Re: Cantonese Eva OP             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Feb 27, 2018 5:36 am Maybe they overdid it with the religious aspect?
summary: []: Cantonese Eva OP             Quote Post by fukuda » Thu Feb 22, 2018 6:19 pm I'd just like to share the Lyrics to the Cantonese Eva OP right here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DePZFPCWxmo From Commenter: 1qszsqaw221 "讓聖經裡的迷途天使又傳道 在這伊甸園你我又再碰到 使徒們，到世間浮沉 歷史的真相有太多的神 無論要你落淚 或要她的鮮血 都不可見到神靈步近 阿門，我快將沉淪 被貶的天使向世間走近 尋覓到我慾望 或有一點悲憤傷 心怨恨從未發問 再抱憾再厭倦一生也未如願 我也是經過路人 你背後有對翼光圈裡 又會否用真心拯救我心 舊約中有位迷途天使在傳道 暴走激鬥墮落時候會變化 幻想全部頹然倒塌未留下 但我想知道世界是有錯嗎 用愛心與她靈魂交錯地存
